projectDescription: A Next.js web platform for Mexican government auditors to search, compare, and analyze public servants' patrimonial declarations, detect asset incongruences, and manage audit case files.
keyFeatures: Patrimonial declaration search across multiple government data sources
Side-by-side comparison of declarations across fiscal years
Automated patrimonial congruence analysis with risk alerts
Audit case file (Revisión) management with risk classification
Admin dashboard with data source connection management
Immutable audit log (Bitácora) for system traceability
Role-based access for Auditors, Administrators, and OIC Chiefs
Risk distribution visualization with interactive charts
publicApiSurface: GET /declaraciones/buscar — Search patrimonial declarations by RFC, name, institution, period
GET /comparacion — Compare two declarations for a public servant
GET /revisiones — List all audit case files
GET /revisiones/:id — View a specific audit case file
GET /fuentes — List configured external data sources
POST /fuentes — Add a new external data source
PUT /fuentes/:id — Update an existing data source
